languages.text: "Безумие и гениальность — два явления одного порядка, и это неоспоримый факт. Спросите себя, Вольный Торговец: так ли вы близки ко второму и далеки от первого? Путь вашего восхождения устлан бесчисленными жертвами, но вы избегаете смотреть себе под ноги, чтобы не сойти с ума."

"Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and so far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."
languages.original_text: "Безумие и гениальность — два явления одного порядка, и это неоспоримый факт. Спросите себя, Вольный Торговец: так ли вы близки ко второму и далеки от первого? Путь вашего восхождения устлан бесчисленными жертвами, но вы избегаете смотреть себе под ноги, чтобы не сойти с ума."

traits.locale_text: "Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking beneath your feet, lest you lose your mind."

"Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking beneath your feet, lest you lose your mind."

The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."

languages.text: «La locura y el genio son dos fenómenos del mismo orden, eso es un hecho irrefutable. Pregúntese, Comerciante Independiente, si de verdad está tan cerca del segundo y tan lejos del primero. El camino de su ascensión está lleno de sacrificios, pero evita mirar abajo para no perder la cabeza».
languages.original_text: "Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and so far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."

traits.locale_text: «La locura y el genio son dos fenómenos del mismo orden, eso es un hecho irrefutable. Pregúntese, Comerciante Independiente, si de verdad está tan cerca del segundo y tan lejos del primero. El camino de su ascensión está lleno de sacrificios, pero evita mirar abajo para no perder la cabeza».

languages.text: “疯子与天才，本就是同一层次的两种现象，这一点毋庸置疑。问问您自己，行商浪人：您真的离天才如此之近，而离疯狂如此之远吗？您的权势之路由无数牺牲铺就，而您始终不敢低头去看，唯恐因此失去理智。”
languages.original_text: "Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and so far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."

traits.locale_text: “疯子与天才，本就是同一层次的两种现象，这一点毋庸置疑。问问您自己，行商浪人：您真的离天才如此之近，而离疯狂如此之远吗？您的权势之路由无数牺牲铺就，而您始终不敢低头去看，唯恐因此失去理智。”

languages.text: "Genie und Wahnsinn sind zwei Phänomene, die sich gegenseitig bedingen. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Fragt Euch selbst, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}: Seid Ihr Ersterem wirklich so nah und Letzterem so fern? Der Weg Eurer Vorfahren ist mit zahllosen Opfern gepflastert, und doch blick Ihr nicht nach unten, um nicht den Verstand zu verlieren."
languages.original_text: "Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and so far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."

traits.locale_text: "Genie und Wahnsinn sind zwei Phänomene, die sich gegenseitig bedingen. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Fragt Euch selbst, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}: Seid Ihr Ersterem wirklich so nah und Letzterem so fern? Der Weg Eurer Vorfahren ist mit zahllosen Opfern gepflastert, und doch blick Ihr nicht nach unten, um nicht den Verstand zu verlieren."

languages.text: « La folie et le génie sont deux phénomènes du même ordre, et il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. Songez-y, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} : êtes-vous vraiment si près du second, et si loin de la première ? La voie de votre ascension est pavée d'innombrables sacrifices, et pourtant, vous évitez de regarder vers le bas de peur de perdre l'esprit. »
languages.original_text: "Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and so far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."

traits.locale_text: « La folie et le génie sont deux phénomènes du même ordre, et il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. languages.text: "Delilik ve deha, aynı düzenden iki olgudur. Bu tartışılmaz bir gerçektir. Kendinize sorun Hür Tacir: Gerçekten ikincisine bu kadar yakın, birincisinden de bu kadar uzak mısınız? Yükselişinizin yolu sayısız fedakârlıkla döşenmiş, yine de aklınızı kaçırmamak için aşağıya bakmaktan kaçınıyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and so far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."

traits.locale_text: "Delilik ve deha, aynı düzenden iki olgudur. Bu tartışılmaz bir gerçektir. Kendinize sorun Hür Tacir: Gerçekten ikincisine bu kadar yakın, birincisinden de bu kadar uzak mısınız? Yükselişinizin yolu sayısız fedakârlıkla döşenmiş, yine de aklınızı kaçırmamak için aşağıya bakmaktan kaçınıyorsunuz."

languages.text: 「狂気と天才は同じ秩序の現象であり、これは疑う余地のない事実です。問いかけてみてください、ローグトレーダー。あなたは本当に天才に近くて狂気に遠いのですか？あなたの成功の道は数え切れない犠牲の上に築かれていますが、あなたは下を向かないでください。そうしないと、あなたは狂ってしまうでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Madness and genius are two phenomena of the same order, and this is an incontrovertible fact. Ask yourself, Rogue Trader: are you truly so close to the latter and so far from the former? The path of your ascendance is paved with countless sacrifices, yet you avoid looking down, lest you lose your mind."

traits.locale_text: 「狂気と天才は同じ秩序の現象であり、これは疑う余地のない事実です。問いかけてみてください、ローグトレーダー。あなたは本当に天才に近くて狂気に遠いのですか？あなたの成功の道は数え切れない犠牲の上に築かれていますが、あなたは下を向かないでください。そうしないと、あなたは狂ってしまうでしょう。」
